message:
perf(stream,service): #[inline] all stream combinator poll_next + merge index-based round-robin + buffer/rate_limit hot paths Stream combinators (map, filter, filter_map, take, take_while, skip, skip_while, chain, enumerate, fuse, inspect, scan, then, zip, iter, merge) and Stream trait blanket impls (Pin

, Box, &mut S) all lacked #[inline] on poll_next, causing indirect-call overhead at every layer of a stream pipeline. Merge combinator replaced VecDeque pop_front/push_back (which memcpy'd stream objects on every poll) with index-based round-robin using a persistent cursor. Buffer service: #[inline] on pending(), is_full(), is_empty(), is_closed(). Rate limiter: #[inline] on available_tokens(), try_acquire(), refill_state(). Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6
